text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aw, GGs, Trainer.... Well, these machines aren't
supposed to be easy to win from.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it is what it is. It'd be no fun if you always
got something, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, the best part of playing these machines is
the rush when the claw comes up! Enjoying that
part's the key to these games!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't beat yourself up! C'mon, I'll treat you
something sweet!
